label: Ashglass Sleep Cell
description: Ashglass Sleep Cell is a narrow, enclosed bedroom formed from the same blast-thick ferrocrete as the surrounding suite, its corners squared and acoustically deadened for blackout discipline. A built-in bunk is mortared into the wall above a recessed footlocker bay, with additional storage niches sealed by flush, gasketed panels. Recessed lumen strips sit behind armored glass slats, casting a cold, regulated light that never reaches full brightness. A slit-window shutter control is set into the inner wall, tying the room’s only aperture to the Pale Meridian Enclave’s beacon-coded alert routines.
